= January 26, 2022 =

== Topics ==
- discrete versus continuous probability distributions
- percentiles, range, and quartiles
- standard deviation questions
- z score
- normal distribution

== Homework Links ==
-   Have a look at page 17 (1.5 discrete and continuous data)
    [[https://math.buet.ac.bd/public/faculty_profile/files/835598806.pdf]]

-   Visualizing quartiles
    [[https://thestatsninja.com/tag/quartiles/]]
    [[https://towardsdatascience.com/statistics-02-measuring-and-visualizing-the-spread-of-data-2fc31d928830]]
